title: 「Whether (or not) 句」句型
titleEn: Using Whether (or not) to express ‘regardless of whether’

source.file: Sentence Structure 33 -「Whether (or not) 句」表達「無論……（與否）」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Whether or not + subject + verb, + main clause

formulas.formula: Whether or not + subject + verb, + main clause
Whether + subject + verb + or not, + main clause
Main clause + whether or not + subject + verb

example: Whether or not John is coming, I will join the team.
exampleZh: 無論 John 來不來，我都會加入這個團隊。

examples.en: Whether or not John is coming, I will join the team.
examples.zh: 無論 John 來不來，我都會加入這個團隊。
examples.highlight: Whether or not John is coming

meaning.zh: Whether or not 表示有兩種可能，但無論哪種可能成真，主句的決定、結果、規則或行動都不會改變。

rules.en: The result in the main clause does not change. Whether or not presents two possibilities, but the main decision, result, rule or action remains the same.
rules.zh: 主句的結果不會改變。Whether or not 表示有兩種可能，但無論哪種可能成真，主句的決定、結果、規則或行動都不會改變。
examples: Whether or not it rains, we will go outside.

rules.en: Or not may appear immediately after whether or after the subject and verb.
rules.zh: Or not 可以放在兩個位置：Whether or not he agrees... 或 Whether he agrees or not....
examples: Whether or not he agrees, we will continue.
Whether he agrees or not, we will continue.

rules.en: Use normal statement word order after whether: subject + verb, not question word order.
rules.zh: Whether 後面使用「主語＋動詞」，不可使用問句語序。
examples: Whether she is ready or not, we must begin.

rules.en: When the whether-clause comes first, it normally takes a comma. When it follows the main clause, a comma is normally unnecessary.
rules.zh: Whether 句放在句首時，後面通常要加逗號；放在主句後面時，通常不需要逗號。
examples: Whether or not the shop is busy, the staff remain polite.
The staff remain polite whether or not the shop is busy.

rules.en: Do not confuse this structure with an ordinary if-condition. If makes the result depend on a condition; whether or not shows that the condition does not affect the result.
rules.zh: 不要與普通 if 條件句混淆。If 表示主句結果取決於條件；Whether or not 表示結果不受該條件影響。
examples: If John comes, I will join the team.
Whether or not John comes, I will join the team.

rules.en: Here, whether does not introduce an object clause meaning ‘whether’. The sentence must show that the main clause remains true in both situations.
rules.zh: 這裏的 whether 不是表示「是否」的賓語句；本課句型必須表達「兩種情況下，主句仍然成立」。
examples: I do not know whether John is coming.

benefits.en: It clearly shows that the result will not change.
benefits.zh: 這個句型可以清楚告訴聽者：無論出現哪種情況，主要決定、行動或規則都不會改變。
你不需要寫出兩句相似的條件句，可以把兩種可能合併成一句。

benefits.en: It helps you express a firm decision.
benefits.zh: 可以表達堅定的決定，說明其他事情不會令你改變計劃。

benefits.en: It is useful for rules and advice.
benefits.zh: 可以表示某項規則或建議在兩種情況下都同樣適用。

benefits.en: It gives you more sentence variety.
benefits.zh: Whether 句可以放在句首或句尾，使說話和寫作不會過於重複。

sourceOmissions: The PDF presents the Important Rules mainly in Chinese; their English versions are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using whether (or not) to show that the main result, decision or rule remains the same in both situations.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 whether (or not) 改寫以下句子，表示無論出現哪種情況，主要結果、決定或規則都不會改變。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: It may rain, or it may not. We will still go for a walk.
questions.promptZh: 可能會下雨，也可能不會。我們仍然會去散步。
questions.answer: Whether or not it rains, we will go for a walk.
questions.answerZh: 無論下不下雨，我們都會去散步。
questions.highlight: Whether or not it rains, we will go for a walk.

questions.prompt: Mia may win the game or lose it. In either case, her family will be proud of her.
questions.promptZh: 米婭可能會勝出比賽，也可能會落敗。無論結果如何，她的家人都會為她感到驕傲。
questions.answer: Whether or not Mia wins the game, her family will be proud of her.
questions.answerZh: 無論米婭能否勝出比賽，她的家人都會為她感到驕傲。
questions.highlight: Whether or not Mia wins the game, her family will be proud of her.

questions.prompt: Leo’s decision to come will not affect my attendance at the meeting.
questions.promptZh: 里奧是否出席，並不會影響我參加會議。
questions.answer: I will attend the meeting whether or not Leo comes.
questions.answerZh: 無論里奧來不來，我都會參加會議。
questions.highlight: I will attend the meeting whether or not Leo comes.

questions.prompt: Ben may like the dish or dislike it, but he should still try one bite.
questions.promptZh: 本可能喜歡這道菜，也可能不喜歡，但他仍然應該試吃一口。
questions.answer: Whether Ben likes the dish or not, he should try one bite.
questions.answerZh: 無論本喜不喜歡這道菜，他都應該試吃一口。
questions.highlight: Whether Ben likes the dish or not, he should try one bite.

questions.prompt: The number of waiting customers will not affect the opening time. The shop will open at nine.
questions.promptZh: 等候的顧客人數不會影響開門時間。商店會在九時開門。
questions.answer: The shop will open at nine whether or not many customers are waiting.
questions.answerZh: 無論是否有很多顧客在等候，商店都會在九時開門。
questions.highlight: The shop will open at nine whether or not many customers are waiting.

questions.prompt: Will Ava receive a certificate if she does not finish first? Yes, she will receive one in either case.
questions.promptZh: 如果艾娃不是第一名，她仍會獲得證書嗎？會，無論結果如何，她都會獲得證書。
questions.answer: Whether or not Ava finishes first, she will receive a certificate.
questions.answerZh: 無論艾娃是否第一名，她都會獲得證書。
questions.highlight: Whether or not Ava finishes first, she will receive a certificate.

questions.prompt: The train may be delayed or on time. In either case, we will take the bus.
questions.promptZh: 火車可能誤點，也可能準時。無論是哪種情況，我們都會乘搭巴士。
questions.answer: We will take the bus whether or not the train is delayed.
questions.answerZh: 無論火車是否誤點，我們都會乘搭巴士。
questions.highlight: We will take the bus whether or not the train is delayed.

questions.prompt: The room may be large or small, but it must be kept tidy.
questions.promptZh: 房間可能很大，也可能很小，但必須保持整潔。
questions.answer: Whether the room is large or not, it must be kept tidy.
questions.answerZh: 無論房間是否寬敞，都必須保持整潔。
questions.highlight: Whether the room is large or not, it must be kept tidy.

questions.prompt: Daniel will keep practising for both easy and difficult tests.
questions.promptZh: 無論測驗容易還是困難，丹尼爾都會繼續練習。
questions.answer: Daniel will keep practising whether or not the test is difficult.
questions.answerZh: 無論測驗是否困難，丹尼爾都會繼續練習。
questions.highlight: Daniel will keep practising whether or not the test is difficult.

questions.prompt: Chloe wears sunscreen on sunny and cloudy days.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊在晴天和陰天都會塗防曬霜。
questions.answer: Whether or not the sun is shining, Chloe wears sunscreen.
questions.answerZh: 無論是否有陽光，克洛伊都會塗防曬霜。
questions.highlight: Whether or not the sun is shining, Chloe wears sunscreen.

questions.prompt: You may agree with me or disagree with me. Please listen to the whole explanation.
questions.promptZh: 你可能同意我，也可能不同意我。請聽完整個解釋。
questions.answer: Whether or not you agree with me, please listen to the whole explanation.
questions.answerZh: 無論你是否同意我，請先聽完整個解釋。
questions.highlight: Whether or not you agree with me, please listen to the whole explanation.

questions.prompt: The team will continue the project with or without extra funding.
questions.promptZh: 不論有沒有額外資金，團隊都會繼續這個項目。
questions.answer: The team will continue the project whether or not extra funding is provided.
questions.answerZh: 無論是否獲得額外資金，團隊都會繼續這個項目。
questions.highlight: The team will continue the project whether or not extra funding is provided.

questions.prompt: Explain how you reached the answer, even if it is incorrect.
questions.promptZh: 即使答案不正確，也要解釋你是如何得出答案的。
questions.answer: Whether the answer is correct or not, explain how you reached it.
questions.answerZh: 無論答案是否正確，都要解釋你是如何得出答案的。
questions.highlight: Whether the answer is correct or not, explain how you reached it.

questions.prompt: Feeling tired after work will not stop Sarah from visiting her grandmother.
questions.promptZh: 下班後感到疲倦，也不會阻止莎拉探望祖母。
questions.answer: Sarah will visit her grandmother whether or not she feels tired after work.
questions.answerZh: 無論下班後是否感到疲倦，莎拉都會探望祖母。
questions.highlight: Sarah will visit her grandmother whether or not she feels tired after work.

questions.prompt: The café may be busy or quiet, but the staff greet every customer politely.
questions.promptZh: 咖啡店可能很繁忙，也可能很清靜，但職員都會有禮貌地招呼每位顧客。
questions.answer: Whether or not the café is busy, the staff greet every customer politely.
questions.answerZh: 無論咖啡店是否繁忙，職員都會有禮貌地招呼每位顧客。
questions.highlight: Whether or not the café is busy, the staff greet every customer politely.

questions.prompt: Tom’s participation does not affect the school trip. It will still go ahead.
questions.promptZh: 湯姆是否參加並不會影響學校旅行。活動仍會照常舉行。
questions.answer: The school trip will go ahead whether or not Tom joins it.
questions.answerZh: 無論湯姆是否參加，學校旅行都會照常舉行。
questions.highlight: The school trip will go ahead whether or not Tom joins it.

questions.prompt: Will Emma buy the book if it is not on sale? Yes, she plans to buy it in either case.
questions.promptZh: 如果這本書沒有特價，艾瑪仍會購買嗎？會，無論是哪種情況，她都打算購買。
questions.answer: Whether or not the book is on sale, Emma plans to buy it.
questions.answerZh: 無論這本書是否有特價，艾瑪都打算購買。
questions.highlight: Whether or not the book is on sale, Emma plans to buy it.

questions.prompt: The computer may seem slow or normal. You should save your work regularly in both cases.
questions.promptZh: 電腦可能看起來很慢，也可能運作正常。無論是哪種情況，你都應該定期儲存工作。
questions.answer: You should save your work regularly whether or not the computer seems slow.
questions.answerZh: 無論電腦是否看起來很慢，你都應該定期儲存工作。
questions.highlight: You should save your work regularly whether or not the computer seems slow.

questions.prompt: The road may be crowded or empty, but the driver must obey the speed limit.
questions.promptZh: 道路可能擠塞，也可能暢通，但司機必須遵守速度限制。
questions.answer: Whether the road is crowded or not, the driver must obey the speed limit.
questions.answerZh: 無論道路是否擠塞，司機都必須遵守速度限制。
questions.highlight: Whether the road is crowded or not, the driver must obey the speed limit.

questions.prompt: The children will play indoors when the playground is open and when it is closed.
questions.promptZh: 遊樂場開放或關閉時，孩子們都會在室內玩耍。
questions.answer: The children will play indoors whether or not the playground is open.
questions.answerZh: 無論遊樂場是否開放，孩子們都會在室內玩耍。
questions.highlight: The children will play indoors whether or not the playground is open.

questions.prompt: What will I do if the package does not arrive today? I will still contact the customer tomorrow.
questions.promptZh: 如果包裹今天沒有到達，我會怎樣做？我仍會在明天聯絡顧客。
questions.answer: Whether or not the package arrives today, I will contact the customer tomorrow.
questions.answerZh: 無論包裹今天是否到達，我都會在明天聯絡顧客。
questions.highlight: Whether or not the package arrives today, I will contact the customer tomorrow.

questions.prompt: Even if the manager has not reviewed the report, it must be submitted on Friday.
questions.promptZh: 即使經理尚未審閱報告，報告也必須在星期五提交。
questions.answer: The report must be submitted on Friday whether or not the manager has reviewed it.
questions.answerZh: 無論經理是否已審閱報告，報告都必須在星期五提交。
questions.highlight: The report must be submitted on Friday whether or not the manager has reviewed it.

questions.prompt: The medicine may taste pleasant or unpleasant, but Noah needs to take it after meals.
questions.promptZh: 藥物的味道可能不錯，也可能不好，但諾亞需要在飯後服用。
questions.answer: Whether the medicine tastes pleasant or not, Noah needs to take it after meals.
questions.answerZh: 無論藥物的味道是否怡人，諾亞都需要在飯後服用。
questions.highlight: Whether the medicine tastes pleasant or not, Noah needs to take it after meals.

questions.prompt: Grace’s smile did not depend on how nervous she felt.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲是否感到緊張，並沒有影響她保持笑容。
questions.answer: Grace kept smiling whether or not she felt nervous.
questions.answerZh: 無論格蕾絲是否感到緊張，她都一直保持笑容。
questions.highlight: Grace kept smiling whether or not she felt nervous.

questions.prompt: Visitors can reach the office by the stairs in both situations: when the lift works and when it does not.
questions.promptZh: 無論升降機能否運作，訪客都可以經樓梯到達辦公室。
questions.answer: Whether or not the lift is working, visitors can reach the office by the stairs.
questions.answerZh: 無論升降機是否運作，訪客都可以經樓梯到達辦公室。
questions.highlight: Whether or not the lift is working, visitors can reach the office by the stairs.

questions.prompt: Someone may remind us, or no one may. The lights must still be switched off.
questions.promptZh: 可能有人提醒我們，也可能沒有人提醒。燈仍然必須關掉。
questions.answer: The lights must be switched off whether or not anyone reminds us.
questions.answerZh: 無論有沒有人提醒我們，燈都必須關掉。
questions.highlight: The lights must be switched off whether or not anyone reminds us.

questions.prompt: The audience may ask questions or remain silent. The speaker will finish by four o’clock in either case.
questions.promptZh: 觀眾可能會提問，也可能保持沉默。無論是哪種情況，講者都會在四時前結束。
questions.answer: Whether the audience asks questions or not, the speaker will finish by four o’clock.
questions.answerZh: 無論觀眾是否提問，講者都會在四時前結束。
questions.highlight: Whether the audience asks questions or not, the speaker will finish by four o’clock.

questions.prompt: Ethan would support the plan even if it did not benefit him personally.
questions.promptZh: 即使這個計劃不會令伊森個人得益，他仍會支持。
questions.answer: Ethan would support the plan whether or not it benefited him personally.
questions.answerZh: 無論這個計劃是否令伊森個人得益，他都會支持。
questions.highlight: Ethan would support the plan whether or not it benefited him personally.

questions.prompt: The weather may improve or remain poor, but the match may still be cancelled for safety reasons.
questions.promptZh: 天氣可能改善，也可能持續惡劣，但比賽仍可能因安全理由而取消。
questions.answer: Whether or not the weather improves, the match may still be cancelled for safety reasons.
questions.answerZh: 無論天氣是否改善，比賽仍可能因安全理由而取消。
questions.highlight: Whether or not the weather improves, the match may still be cancelled for safety reasons.

questions.prompt: Children can enter the museum free regardless of where they live.
questions.promptZh: 不論居住地點，兒童都可以免費進入博物館。
questions.answer: Children can enter the museum free whether or not they live locally.
questions.answerZh: 無論兒童是否居於本區，他們都可以免費進入博物館。
questions.highlight: Children can enter the museum free whether or not they live locally.

questions.prompt: Do experienced users need to read the instructions? Yes, both new and experienced users should read them carefully.
questions.promptZh: 有經驗的使用者需要閱讀指示嗎？需要，新使用者和有經驗的使用者都應仔細閱讀。
questions.answer: Whether or not you have used this app before, read the instructions carefully.
questions.answerZh: 無論你以前是否使用過這個應用程式，都要仔細閱讀指示。
questions.highlight: Whether or not you have used this app before, read the instructions carefully.

questions.prompt: The nurse checks every patient’s name in both busy and quiet wards.
questions.promptZh: 無論病房繁忙還是清靜，護士都會核對每位病人的姓名。
questions.answer: The nurse checks every patient’s name whether or not the ward is busy.
questions.answerZh: 無論病房是否繁忙，護士都會核對每位病人的姓名。
questions.highlight: The nurse checks every patient’s name whether or not the ward is busy.

questions.prompt: The bus may arrive on time or late. We should still leave enough time for the walk from the station.
questions.promptZh: 巴士可能準時到達，也可能誤點。我們仍應預留足夠時間由車站步行前往目的地。
questions.answer: Whether the bus arrives on time or not, we should leave enough time for the walk from the station.
questions.answerZh: 無論巴士是否準時到達，我們都應預留足夠時間由車站步行前往目的地。
questions.highlight: Whether the bus arrives on time or not, we should leave enough time for the walk from the station.

questions.prompt: The new rule applies to employees in the office and those working from home.
questions.promptZh: 新規則適用於在辦公室工作和在家工作的僱員。
questions.answer: The new rule applies to all employees whether or not they work from home.
questions.answerZh: 無論僱員是否在家工作，新規則都適用於所有人。
questions.highlight: The new rule applies to all employees whether or not they work from home.

questions.prompt: Maya may have remembered the appointment, or she may have forgotten it. The clinic still sent her a reminder.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅可能記得預約，也可能忘記了。診所仍然向她發出提醒。
questions.answer: Whether or not Maya remembered the appointment, the clinic sent her a reminder.
questions.answerZh: 無論瑪雅是否記得預約，診所都向她發出了提醒。
questions.highlight: Whether or not Maya remembered the appointment, the clinic sent her a reminder.

questions.prompt: Keep the receipt even if you do not expect to return the item.
questions.promptZh: 即使你不打算退回貨品，也要保留收據。
questions.answer: Please keep the receipt whether or not you expect to return the item.
questions.answerZh: 無論你是否打算退回貨品，請保留收據。
questions.highlight: Please keep the receipt whether or not you expect to return the item.

questions.prompt: Every machine must be inspected before use, including machines that are brand new.
questions.promptZh: 每部機器在使用前都必須接受檢查，包括全新的機器。
questions.answer: Whether the machine is new or not, it must be inspected before use.
questions.answerZh: 無論機器是否全新，在使用前都必須接受檢查。
questions.highlight: Whether the machine is new or not, it must be inspected before use.

questions.prompt: The volunteers continued distributing food in dry weather and in the rain.
questions.promptZh: 天氣乾爽或下雨時，義工都繼續派發食物。
questions.answer: The volunteers continued distributing food whether or not it was raining.
questions.answerZh: 無論當時是否下雨，義工都繼續派發食物。
questions.highlight: The volunteers continued distributing food whether or not it was raining.

questions.prompt: The website’s availability does not affect phone orders. Customers can always order by phone.
questions.promptZh: 網站能否使用並不影響電話訂購。顧客隨時都可以透過電話下單。
questions.answer: Whether or not the website is available, customers can place orders by phone.
questions.answerZh: 無論網站是否可用，顧客都可以透過電話下單。
questions.highlight: Whether or not the website is available, customers can place orders by phone.

questions.prompt: Will the teacher answer a question that is not related to today’s lesson? Yes, the teacher will answer it anyway.
questions.promptZh: 老師會回答與今天課堂無關的問題嗎？會，老師仍會回答。
questions.answer: The teacher will answer the question whether or not it is related to today’s lesson.
questions.answerZh: 無論問題是否與今天的課堂有關，老師都會回答。
questions.highlight: The teacher will answer the question whether or not it is related to today’s lesson.

questions.prompt: The council may approve or reject the proposal this month. The residents will continue discussing safer road designs.
questions.promptZh: 區議會可能在本月批准或否決建議。居民仍會繼續討論更安全的道路設計。
questions.answer: Whether or not the council approves the proposal this month, the residents will continue discussing safer road designs.
questions.answerZh: 無論區議會本月是否批准建議，居民都會繼續討論更安全的道路設計。
questions.highlight: Whether or not the council approves the proposal this month, the residents will continue discussing safer road designs.

questions.prompt: A patient may be unable to show identification immediately. The hospital must still provide urgent care.
questions.promptZh: 病人可能無法立即出示身份證明。醫院仍必須提供緊急治療。
questions.answer: The hospital must provide urgent care whether or not a patient can show identification immediately.
questions.answerZh: 無論病人能否立即出示身份證明，醫院都必須提供緊急治療。
questions.highlight: The hospital must provide urgent care whether or not a patient can show identification immediately.

questions.prompt: The company may reach its sales target or miss it. Staff should receive clear feedback in both situations.
questions.promptZh: 公司可能達到銷售目標，也可能未能達標。在兩種情況下，員工都應獲得清晰的工作表現意見。
questions.answer: Whether the company reaches its sales target or not, staff should receive clear feedback on their performance.
questions.answerZh: 無論公司是否達到銷售目標，員工都應獲得清晰的工作表現意見。
questions.highlight: Whether the company reaches its sales target or not, staff should receive clear feedback on their performance.

questions.prompt: The event organisers will prepare an indoor area even if the forecast says that the weather will stay dry.
questions.promptZh: 即使天氣預報表示天氣會保持乾爽，活動主辦單位仍會準備室內場地。
questions.answer: The event organisers will prepare an indoor area whether or not rain is forecast.
questions.answerZh: 無論天氣預報是否預測有雨，活動主辦單位都會準備室內場地。
questions.highlight: The event organisers will prepare an indoor area whether or not rain is forecast.

questions.prompt: The team will record every step accurately for expected and unexpected research results alike.
questions.promptZh: 無論研究結果是否符合預期，團隊都會準確記錄每個步驟。
questions.answer: Whether or not the research produces the expected result, the team will record every step accurately.
questions.answerZh: 無論研究是否得出預期結果，團隊都會準確記錄每個步驟。
questions.highlight: Whether or not the research produces the expected result, the team will record every step accurately.

questions.prompt: Passengers with and without previous experience on the route should follow the safety instructions.
questions.promptZh: 曾經或未曾乘搭這條路線的乘客都應遵從安全指示。
questions.answer: Passengers should follow the safety instructions whether or not they have travelled on the route before.
questions.answerZh: 無論乘客以前是否乘搭過這條路線，都應遵從安全指示。
questions.highlight: Passengers should follow the safety instructions whether or not they have travelled on the route before.

questions.prompt: The new system may save time or fail to do so. In both cases, the department must protect users’ personal information.
questions.promptZh: 新系統可能節省時間，也可能未能做到。無論是哪種情況，部門都必須保障使用者的個人資料。
questions.answer: Whether the new system saves time or not, the department must protect users’ personal information.
questions.answerZh: 無論新系統能否節省時間，部門都必須保障使用者的個人資料。
questions.highlight: Whether the new system saves time or not, the department must protect users’ personal information.

questions.prompt: Changes in the number of participants will not affect the free classes offered by the community centre.
questions.promptZh: 參加者人數的變化不會影響社區中心提供的免費課程。
questions.answer: The community centre will continue offering free classes whether or not the number of participants changes.
questions.answerZh: 無論參加者人數是否有變，社區中心都會繼續提供免費課程。
questions.highlight: The community centre will continue offering free classes whether or not the number of participants changes.

questions.prompt: The interview panel must fairly assess the skills of candidates with and without previous experience.
questions.promptZh: 評審小組必須公平評核有經驗及沒有經驗的求職者的技能。
questions.answer: Whether or not a candidate has previous experience, the interview panel must assess the candidate’s skills fairly.
questions.answerZh: 無論求職者是否有相關經驗，評審小組都必須公平評核其技能。
questions.highlight: Whether or not a candidate has previous experience, the interview panel must assess the candidate’s skills fairly.

questions.prompt: The school will review its emergency plan every year, including years in which no serious incident has happened.
questions.promptZh: 學校每年都會檢討緊急應變計劃，包括沒有發生嚴重事故的年份。
questions.answer: The school will review its emergency plan every year whether or not any serious incident has occurred.
questions.answerZh: 無論有沒有發生嚴重事故，學校每年都會檢討緊急應變計劃。
questions.highlight: The school will review its emergency plan every year whether or not any serious incident has occurred.
